uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload. Two 7-byte frames: dataId 4097 (soil temperature, raw 23500/1000=23.5 degC) and dataId 4099 (soil VWC, raw 42180/1000=42.18 %), CRC16 trailer 124,79. expected.data mirrors the upstream sensecap-codec oracle messages [{4097:23.5},{4099:42.18}] mapped onto soil.temperature/soil.moisture.

Synthetic in-bounds payload exercising two's-complement negative temperature. Three frames: dataId 4097 (raw -5250/1000=-5.25 degC), dataId 4099 (12500/1000=12.5 %), dataId 4100 (soil EC, 1234/1000=1.234 dS/m), CRC16 trailer 136,223. Upstream oracle returns [{4097:'-5.25'},{4099:12.5},{4100:1.234}] (negative is a string upstream; our authored port emits the JSON number -5.25).

uplink.description: battery + reporting interval frame (no field measurement)
uplink._note: Synthetic special dataId 7 frame. Upstream oracle returns upload_battery battery=88 (percent) and upload_interval interval=3600 (60 min * 60). We emit batteryPercent (vocabulary battery is volts, not percent) and reportingInterval seconds. CRC16 trailer 200,172.
First data vector with its final CRC byte flipped (79 -> 176), so the running CRC16 over the whole payload is non-zero and the codec rejects it before parsing frames.
